explanation: Substitution: Replaced the remote URL with a local file path to avoid triggering the 'http://' or 'https://' detection in the Sigma rule.
Insertion: Added a benign flag '-src' before the local file path to modify the command line structure without changing the actual action, potentially evading string-based detection.
Reordering: Used a different command-line syntax (PowerShell's start-process) to execute the same action, which may not match the Sigma rule's detection logic based on direct command-line parsing.
